objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryAuthority WHERE Name IN ('Health Protection Branch Ministry of Health', 'Public Health Act') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryAuthority'

SELECT Id, Name, Subject,Description, EffectiveFrom, RegulatoryAuthorityId, RegulatoryAuthority.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryCode WHERE RegulatoryAuthority.Name IN ('Health Protection Branch Ministry of Health', 'Public Health Act') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryCode'

SELECT Id, Name, Category__c, DataType, Criticality__c, InspectionQuestiontype__c, PHOCSParentId__c, PHOCSParentId__r.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentIndicatorDefinition WHERE Category__c IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentIndicatorDefinition' ORDER BY PHOCSParentId__c NULLS FIRST

SELECT Id, AssessmentIndDefinitionId, AssessmentIndDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c, RegulatoryCodeId, RegulatoryCode.Name, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryCodeAssessmentInd WHERE AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser')

SELECT Id, Name, TaskType, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentTaskDefinition WHERE Name IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentTaskDefinition'

SELECT Id, AssessmentTaskDefinitionId, AssessmentTaskDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinitionId, AssessmentIndDefinition.Name, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentTaskIndDefinition WHERE AssessmentTaskDefinition.Name IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser')
